title: Wormhole Items
description: All of the CUSTOM items (that require multiple command blocks) from the Wormhole by Spoke, improved, and packed as a datapack.
body:
This datapack adds all of the advanced/custom items from the Wormhole directly as an easy-to-use pack!

For context, the Wormhole is a Minecraft glitch performed by Spoke which allowed him to gain _unfathomable power_! With this, he created many OP items like a literal gun.

The vanilla items are NOT included in this pack and they can be found at on Spoke's Discord at [discord.gg/spokeishere](https://discord.gg/spokeishere) (or click this [direct link](https://tinyurl.com/wormhole-items)).

<details>
  <summary>Source (World File)</summary>
  
  [https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1158193866361548851/1158199428990111744/Wormhole_Items.zip?ex=68cb52c6&is=68ca0146&hm=9a61ccadf6823687967375c927b3147b30e3e4b7e2b2a7cd861c15bdff8f6b47&](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1158193866361548851/1158199428990111744/Wormhole_Items.zip?ex=68cb52c6&is=68ca0146&hm=9a61ccadf6823687967375c927b3147b30e3e4b7e2b2a7cd861c15bdff8f6b47&)
</details>

The only other custom item not included is the **Crown of Premium Subscriptions** which uses a command called "demo" that doesn't actually exist, I assume it's from a plugin or mod. (Yes, I tested it on a multiplayer server.)

<details>
  <summary>List of All Items & How To Get Them (Spoilers)</summary>

  - Name any item `"Stasis Marker"` and drop it to mark where you want to set the stasis. _(Note only one stasis can exist at a time.)_
  - Name any item `"Stasis Remove"` and drop it to remove the stasis.
  - Name an **Eye of Ender** as `"Stasis Return"` and put it in your off-hand to instantly teleport back to your stasis. _(Your Stasis Return will not be used up, and you can keep it anywhere in your inventory. Your off-hand is its activation slot.)_
  - Name a pair of **diamond boots** as `"Frost Stompers"` and wear them. This will replace air & water under you to ice that will eventually melt. Use with caution next to redstone!
  - Name a pair of **diamond boots** as `"Greaves of Tomfoolery"` and wear them. It will replace nearby (a really large range actually) water to blue stained glass, logs to magma blocks, and leaves to basalt. It will also make nearby villagers trade you coal instead. Originally 3 wheat for an emerald? Now 3 wheat for COAL.
  - Name a **poisonous potato** to `"Gravity Wand"`. When holding right click, it will basically force the nearest entity to wherever you're looking. You can even clip them through walls, suffocate them, or throw them in the void! If you hold right click while it is in your offhand, it will teleport you forward in the direction you're looking instead. Be careful, as you can still die to suffocation, drowning, ... basically anything other than fall damage (it will protect you from fall damage). `Note: In pre-v3.1, use an end rod instead of a poisonous potato, offhand is not supported, and you do not have to hold right click.`
  - Name any item that can be equipped on your **head** to `"Crown of Zeus"`. When equipped, it will smite nearby (all) entities! `Note: In 1.19.3, Zeus's Blessing enchantment doesn't exist. So even though the lightning won't strike you, if you are close enough, you will still get damaged.`
  - Name any item that can be equipped on your **head** to `"Crown of Control"`. When equipped, it will give nearby entities Weakness 4 and Slowness 4, and remove nearby potions, tridents, and arrows.
  - Name any item that can be equipped on your **chest** to `"Cloak of Ruin"`. When equipped, it will literally just instantly kill nearby entities.
  - Name **armor stands** to `"C4"`. When dropped (it is important that it is **dropped** and **not placed**), it will summon a C4 (explosion power the same as a TNT).
  - Name a **tripwire hook** to `"C4 Detonator"`. When held in your off-hand, it will detonate *all* existing C4s.
  - Name any item `"Forcefield Marker"`. When dropped on the ground, it will form a circle of size 10 (a red border will be shown for clarity). Players must have a **written book** named "AuthPass" to enter, or else they will be teleported 55 blocks in the sky! Supports **multiple** forcefields at once!
  - Name any item `"Forcefield Remove"`. When dropped on the ground, it will remove **all** forcefields.
  - Name **iron horse armor** to `"Gun"`. When held, it will shoot out a line of flames in the direction you're looking at. Any mob that touches the line will be shot and damaged! It will also set the mobs on fire, but not the blocks. (Not as OP as it won't one-shot mobs.) `Note: In 1.19.3, rename to "Flame Gun" instead.` **Range: 50 blocks**
  - Name **iron horse armor** to `"Flame Gun"`. When holding right click, it will shoot out a line of flames in the direction you're looking at. Any surface that it touches will set on fire! If you hold right click while it is in your offhand, it will "suck the soul" of any mob you're aiming at. (Deals more damage than normal mode, and will set soul sand/soul soil on fire) `Note: In 1.19.3, this item doesn't exist. In pre-v3.1 & 1.19.3, it will activate automatically when held and does not have offhand support.` **Range: 15 blocks**
  - Name **poisonous potato** to `"Rail Cannon"`. When held, if it is not on cooldown, it will show a red dot in front of you. When right clicked, it will explode everything in a 150 block line, starting from the red dot. Then it will go on cooldown for 7.5 seconds. (Cool down is to prevent crashing potato pcs, or those with huge amounts of mods) **This is an original custom item by me, not from the wormhole.** `Note: In 1.19.3 & pre-v3.1, this item doesn't exist.`
</details>
<details>
  <summary>List of All Enchantments (1.21.8+ Only) (Spoilers)</summary>
  
  - **Zeus's Blessing**: Makes player immune to **lightning** damage. `Applicable on HELMETS.`
  - **Pryotection**: Makes player immune to **fire** damage. `Applicable on ALL ARMOR.`
  - **Explosion Protection**: Makes player immune to only **TNT**s, so that wind charges, etc. will still work. `Applicable on ALL ARMOR.`
</details>
<details>
  <summary>List of All Tags (1.21.8+ Only) (Spoilers)</summary>
  
  - **non-flammable** (block tag): A list of non-flammable blocks, like air, water, etc. so that the _Flame Gun_ won't set everything on fire (without this tag everywhere you look would be fire, including the air!)
  - **armor** (item tag): A full list of every armor piece in the game. Used to define what items can be applied with _explosion protection_ or _pyrotection_ (Minecraft doesn't have a full tag for this, only separate ones.)
</details>
